name: vp_backtest_on_demand
description: Run Neo's full 9-strategy parallel backtest on any VP token. Returns Sharpe ratio, win rate, max drawdown, and trade count for all 9 strategies (EMA trend, RSI bounce, MACD cross, BB reversal, Mean reversion, Momentum breakout, VP momentum, Alpha strategy, gplearn evolved). Identifies the best-performing strategy with ranking. Powered by 166+ days of real 4h OHLCV data from GeckoTerminal.
